name: Grid.js
when_to_use: 需要轻量框架无关的本地搜索、排序和分页数据表时用它而非手写 table 状态机,因为原生手写在排序类型、筛选状态、分页边界和重绘一致性上失败;一次性静态小表格非做它。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写静态 table,做不到可靠的搜索/排序/分页组合状态与边界处理;Grid.js 用 columns+data 的浅契约补齐交互层。

data_in.note: data_in.config 直接传给 new Grid(config);本条主路径固定为 columns + 二维 data,每行单元格数必须与列数一致。

config.columns: (string | {name:string,id?:string,sort?:boolean,width?:string})[] —— id 默认从 name 规范化,sort 默认继承 config.sort,width 默认 auto
config.sort?: boolean | Gridjs.SortConfig —— boot 默认 true
config.pagination?: false | {limit?:number,summary?:boolean} —— boot 默认 {limit:10},limit 默认 10,summary 默认 true
config.language?: Gridjs.Language —— 默认上游英文文案

spec.note: 表格自身按内容增高;boot 给外层容器默认 max-height 400px与 overflow:auto,避免长数据撑穿载体,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: 表格 columns/data 的轴向容易颠倒,分页又有对象分支,附最小原生 config。

carriers.widget: supported:主题 CSS 放入 shadowRoot,Grid.js DOM 全落 shadow 容器
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 同源 CSS,无上行依赖

isolation.evidence: gridjs@6.2.0 +esm(52KB,document.addEventListener 出现 4 次即未别名化,故 0 计数可信):0 document.head、0 document.body、0 createElement(style)、0 insertRule → 无全局样式/DOM 注入;4 处 document.addEventListener(列宽拖拽/指针跟踪类,低危、通常随手势)。Preact 渲入容器,主题为独立静态 CSS;widget boot 把主题 CSS 与容器全落 shadowRoot,shadow 内可用。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a lightweight, framework-agnostic data table with local search, sorting, and pagination instead of a handwritten table state machine, which fails at sort types, filter state, page boundaries, and redraw consistency. Not for a one-off small static table.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only write a static table and cannot reliably combine search, sorting, and pagination state or handle their boundaries; Grid.js adds the interaction layer through a shallow columns+data contract.

data_in.note: data_in.config is passed directly to new Grid(config); the main path in this entry is fixed to columns plus two-dimensional data, and each row must contain the same number of cells as there are columns.

config.columns: (string | {name:string,id?:string,sort?:boolean,width?:string})[] -- id defaults to a normalized name, sort inherits config.sort by default, and width defaults to auto
config.pagination?: false | {limit?:number,summary?:boolean} -- Boot default {limit:10}; limit defaults to 10 and summary to true
config.language?: Gridjs.Language -- Defaults to upstream English copy
config.className?: Gridjs.ClassName -- Defaults to theme class names

spec.note: The table grows with its content; boot gives the outer container max-height 400px and overflow:auto so long data does not overflow the carrier. vh and percentage heights are forbidden by rule 3.
